description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named p4c-lint that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference, except for the main branch. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with specific environment variables, checking out submodules recursively, setting up Python, using ccache, and then building and running various linters and formatters.
